jsonLd.title: Grofers is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Grofers family as a E-commerce Executive in Pune. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Grofers:
Grofers is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Grofers!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
